title: Reporting last 30 days, etc.?
excerpt: I know there are options for this month, last month etc. but what if I am on the 2nd of the month? I need to pull the last 30 days, 60 days, 90 days - If I choose this month - it only shows me the last 11 days( as of Dec…

posts.author: Sara413 (Sara Mahan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I know there are options for this month, last month etc. but what if I am on the 2nd of the month? I need to pull the last 30 days, 60 days, 90 days - If I choose this month - it only shows me the last 11 days( as of December 11th) if I choose last month, it only shows me November - if I choose both - come December 31st I will have two full months worth of data…am I missing something? Is it really not possible to get timed data from Monday reporting? Open to app suggestions at no additional cost.

Thanks!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Sara413 - you can use the “In the last” date filter for this:

image704×262 15.4 KB

Hope this helps,
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: Sara413 (Sara Mahan)
posts.cookedHtml: I KNEW I had to be missing something! Thank you so much!!

posts.author: Sara413 (Sara Mahan)
posts.cookedHtml:
haha okay I may have gotten exicted too soon - so what if I wanted to see say any items that have not hade a column change in the last # of days?

i.e. Show me any tasks that have not had a status log(text column) update within the last 30 days?

But truly, thanks again, the above already solved half of the issue

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Sara413 - just add the “Last Updated” column type to your board, then use the same filter on it as a regular date column

image748×252 15.9 KB
